ddls:
CREATE TABLE "test_cases" (
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the test case */,
  "kind" INTEGER /* Type of test (e.g., run, compile-fails) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the test case */,
  "expected_result" TEXT /* Expected result of the test case */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the test (e.g., Pass, Fail) */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Ticket or issue ID associated with the test case */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Project ID associated with the test case */,
  "suite_id" INTEGER /* Suite ID associated with the test case */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the test case */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the test case was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the test case */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the test case was last modified */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the test case */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the test case is logically deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_kind FOREIGN KEY ("kind") REFERENCES test_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_suite_id FOREIGN KEY ("suite_id") REFERENCES test_suites ("suite_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result entry */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case executed */,
  "execution_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was executed */,
  "actual_result" TEXT /* Actual result of the test case execution */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Additional remarks or notes regarding the test run */,
  "executed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the test */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the test was executed */,
  "test_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the test execution */,
  "test_version" INTEGER /* Version of the test case at the time of execution */,
  "is_retest" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the test is a retest */,
  "retest_reason" TEXT /* Reason for retesting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_executed_by FOREIGN KEY ("executed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Developer, Tester, Project Manager) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "lead_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project lead */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., In Planning, Active, Completed) */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "actual_cost" TEXT /* Actual cost incurred for the project */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the project is archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_lead_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "issue_title" TEXT /* Title of the issue or ticket */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the ticket (e.g., Open, In Progress, Closed) */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the ticket */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the ticket (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the ticket was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the ticket was last updated */,
  "closed_date" TEXT /* Date when the ticket was closed */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution for the ticket */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the test category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test category */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the category was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the category was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the category is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_suites" (
  "suite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test suite */,
  "suite_name" TEXT /* Name of the test suite */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test suite */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Project ID associated with the test suite */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the test suite */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the test suite was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the test suite */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the test suite was last modified */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the test suite is logically deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_suites_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_suites_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_suites_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_executions" (
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test execution log */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case that was executed */,
  "executed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the test */,
  "execution_date" TEXT /* Date of test execution */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the execution (e.g., Pass, Fail) */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the test was executed */,
  "test_version" INTEGER /* Version of the test case at the time of execution */,
  "test_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the test execution */,
  "is_retest" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the test is a retest */,
  "retest_reason" TEXT /* Reason for retesting */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the execution log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("execution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_executions_executed_by FOREIGN KEY ("executed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_executions_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id")
)
